claim: AI diagram generation requires self-validation loops: agents must render diagrams, visually inspect output, and iterate until visual hierarchy and layout match the concept
actionable: Build diagram generation skills with a validation loop using Playwright + Python to screenshot and inspect output; iterate until visual quality matches expectations
source_title: Build BEAUTIFUL Diagrams with Claude Code (Full Workflow)

claim: Agents generate diagrams poorly without guidance on visual patterns; avoid blocky, repetitive layouts by teaching agents to argue visually and mirror concept structure
actionable: In diagram skill prompts, emphasize that visual structure should mirror the concept's behavior; remove instructions to just use boxes and text
source_title: Build BEAUTIFUL Diagrams with Claude Code (Full Workflow)

claim: Complex diagrams (many elements, multiple scenes) must be built section-by-section to avoid 32k token output limits; assess diagram depth first, then chunk generation
actionable: For complex diagrams, break generation into labeled sections; assess complexity upfront and generate in chunks if needed
source_title: Build BEAUTIFUL Diagrams with Claude Code (Full Workflow)

claim: Customizable design patterns and color palettes encoded in skill markdown let agents consistently generate branded diagrams without retraining
actionable: Encode your design system (colors, patterns, typography) as examples and constraints in diagram skill.md; let agents reference these consistently
source_title: Build BEAUTIFUL Diagrams with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
